entries.mnemonic: 发音:"依靠农民"→发展"经济"离不开农民

senses.def_en: careful use of money, resources, etc.
senses.example: You should learn to practice economy in making out the household budget.
senses.example_zh: 你应当在制订家庭预算时学会精打细算。

derivatives: economic a. 经济上的 n.[-s]经济学
economise/-ize v. 节省,紧缩开支

senses.example: Due to low investment, industrial output has remained stagnant.
senses.example_zh: 由于投资少，工业生产一直停滞不前。

derivatives: stagnation n. 不流动;不景气

senses.example: You must not get out of the car when it is in motion.
senses.example_zh: 汽车行驶的时候千万不能下车。

senses.def_en: a formal suggestion or proposal that is made at a meeting for sth. to be done
senses.example: The motion was adopted by a majority of six votes.
senses.example_zh: 该提议以6票的多数获得采纳。

senses.def_en: to direct by making a gesture
senses.example: He motioned (to) me to come in.

derivatives: motionless a. 不动的,静止的

senses.def_en: to set in motion; make active
senses.example: The burglar alarm is activated by movement.
senses.example_zh: 这防盗警报器一动就会响。
该党在种族隔离问题上分歧严重。

senses.example: He split his pants at the seams when he bent over.
senses.example_zh: 他弯下身去时，把裤子接缝处绷裂了。

senses.def_en: to divide money, food, etc. among people or things
senses.example: Let's split the cost of the meal.
Arguments over admitting women to the club may lead to a split.
senses.example_zh: 在接受妇女参加俱乐部问题上的争论能导致分裂。

derivatives: 【短语】split up 断绝关系;划分：In 1991, the USSR split up into its constituent republics. 1991年，前苏联分裂成为联邦的各个共和国。

senses.example: John converted the truck into a mobile library.
senses.example_zh: 约翰将卡车改装成了一个流动图书馆。

senses.example: He has the mobile face of an actor.
senses.example_zh: 他有一张演员一样的表情多变的脸。

senses.example: Give me a call on my mobile. Have you got my mobile number?
senses.example_zh: 给我电话吧。你有我的手机号码吗？

derivatives: mobility n. 可动性,机动性

senses.example: It became the first reusable vehicle in space.
senses.example_zh: 它成为第一个能重复使用的宇宙交通工具。

senses.def_en: a medium through which sth. is transmitted, expressed, or accomplished
senses.example: Television has become an important vehicle for spreading political ideas.
senses.example_zh: 电视已成为传播政治思想的重要媒介。
